name: sd_d4_lazy_lead_del
drl:
rule "RJ"
when
    not LK2(f1 != true)
    $p : P($x : f0)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
rule "RD"
no-loop
salience -5
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
_finding: oracle [RJ1,RD2,RJ1,RD1]: lead-LAZY justifier + deleter — t15 re-derivation CLEARS FIRED MARKS (RJ refires the same P1 as a new tuple object) and the waited deleter fires LIFO; engine [RJ1,RJ2,RD1,RD2] (lead clause-B miss + order). Doubly divergent.
